mapper.insert: INSERT INTO point (memberUid, orderNo, point, content, note, createdAt, expireDate) VALUES (#{memberUid}, #{orderNo}, #{point}, #{content}, #{note}, NOW(), #{expireDate})
mapper.select: SELECT p.pointNo, p.memberUid, p.orderNo, p.point, p.content, p.note, p.createdAt, p.expireDate FROM point p WHERE p.memberUid = #{memberUid} ORDER BY p.createdAt DESC, p.pointNo DESC
